scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix partner-portals
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,event-portal,store-portal -c blue,green,cyan,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix partner-portals run dev:event" "npm --prefix partner-portals run dev:store"
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test:smoke && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix partner-portals run test
